title: Dinnerbone
description: Lightweight coordinate utility mod to make travelling easier.
body:
# Dinnerbone
Coordinate utility mod

## Commands
- `/coordinates` Return your coordinates as `Pos: (x,y,z)`
- `/setdestination <x> <y> <z>` Set your desired destination

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/duyFlmQ1/images/0a25330c5d8e4e0f3d6e5b25d97dc461bb9c0af9.png)

**REQUIRES FABRIC-API https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api**
